summary: Tested professional video effects features (Apple-style text, logo animation, gradient text). All backend APIs work correctly - video generation, auto-format detection, file upload. Frontend flows work. All 25 backend tests passed. Browser video playback has intermittent issues due to audio stream duration mismatch.

minor.issue: When TTS audio duration is shorter than video duration, browser may have playback issues (FFmpegDemuxer error)
minor.note: Videos are still downloadable and playable in most video players

integration_issues.issue: Some videos show loading spinner but don't play in browser due to audio/video duration mismatch

passed_tests: Formats endpoint returns 16 video formats including all professional effects
Apple-style text animation generates successfully with word-by-word reveal
Logo animation with uploaded logo creates rotation+scale animation
Logo animation without logo falls back to gradient text animation
Gradient text animation with shimmer effect works
Video generation API (POST /api/video/generate) accepts prompt and returns project ID
Video status API (GET /api/video/{id}) returns correct status and video URL
File upload API (POST /api/upload) accepts logo/image files
Auto-detection of format_id works for chat, gradient, and Apple-style prompts
CreatePage UI loads with data-testid attributes
Prompt input, submit button, and video upload buttons work
Full video generation flow: prompt → submit → navigation → progress → completion
action_items: Consider extending TTS audio to match video duration in add_audio_to_video (loop or pad with silence)
Add fallback error handling in frontend VideoPage when video playback fails
critical_code_review_comments: universal_effects.py: Logo animation and professional video rendering correctly include silent audio track via ffmpeg
server.py: Logo animation path correctly handles both uploaded logos and fallback to gradient text
video_service.py add_audio_to_video: Should ensure audio duration >= video duration by looping/padding

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows work, minor video playback issue)

seed_data_creation: Created test videos: Apple-style (2e510af3), Logo animation (41a647b0), Gradient text (0ecd8393)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All professional video effect APIs work correctly. Video files are generated with proper h264+aac encoding. Browser playback issues occur when TTS audio is shorter than video - this affects logo_animation format specifically. Test by generating logo_animation with short brand name and checking playback.

apple_style_text_animation.details: Word-by-word reveal with scale+fade effect renders correctly on white background

gradient_text_animation.details: Gradient colored text on black background with shimmer renders correctly

logo_animation.details: Logo upload accepted, rotation (-10° to +5° settle) and scale (0.5 to 1.0) animation works, brand name reveal with slide-up animation works

video_generation_api.details: POST /api/video/generate accepts prompt and returns project ID

video_status_api.details: GET /api/video/{id} returns video URL when completed

file_upload_api.details: POST /api/upload accepts logo/image files and returns URL
